target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural damage including collapsed roof sections, exposed internal framing, and widespread debris; damage covers more than 45% of the visible facade and roof area, consistent with severe damage definition for framed buildings.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Large portions of roof and upper floors are missing; facade is heavily damaged with exposed structural elements; debris field at base indicates collapse of significant structural mass; fire and smoke indicate ongoing destruction consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (40-118, 245-479) and another DESTROYED (115-763, 77-479). The scene depicts a large, multi-story building with extensive fire and structural collapse, smoke billowing from multiple points, and a debris field at the base, indicating catastrophic destruction. The functional impact is likely total loss of the destroyed building and severe impairment of the severely damaged one, rendering them unusable.
